The MethodWorkPowered by Maxxim3D Process Start a conversation

THE 3D PROCESS

Discover. Design. Deploy. Then deepen.

A proven method, run in three gated phases, then a compounding loop. Every phase produces documents you can open and read — not just decks.

See the method in market → Read the full method →

The 3D Process stages

01

Discover

Define the true driver everything builds on.

A clear growth direction you can act on.

02

Design

Build the system that carries it.

A growth system ready to deploy.

03

Deploy

Ship it, and run it.

A deployed engine, running and moving the number.

∞

Deepen

It doesn't stop at Deploy.

What we learn compounds instead of going stale.

WHAT YOU ACTUALLY GET

A growth system you can see, approve and use.

Every phase of the 3D Process produces practical documents, not just presentations. We diagnose what needs to move, design the strategy and assets around it, then deploy the work with reporting and next actions attached.

Built for leaders who want clarity, momentum and a system their team can keep using.

Discover

We diagnose the market, customer, offer and current constraint so the strategy is grounded in evidence.

Audience & Market 5
  • Audience Teardown
  • Customer Segments
  • Customer Pain Points
  • Buying Triggers & Barriers
  • Jobs To Be Done
Category & Competitors 4
  • Competitor Analysis
  • Category Positioning
  • Market Gaps
  • Differentiation Opportunities
Offer & Commercial Diagnosis 5
  • Offer Worksheet
  • Product / Service Review
  • Pricing / Packaging Notes
  • Sales Process Review
  • Funnel Review
Discovery Output 5
  • Success Definition
  • Objectives & Key Results
  • Discover Summary
  • Priority Problems To Solve
  • Recommended Next Moves

Design

We turn the discovery into strategy, messaging, brand direction, plans and briefs that can be built from.

Business & Growth Strategy 4
  • Business Plan / Growth Plan
  • Strategic Priorities
  • Growth Roadmap
  • Measurement Plan
Customer & Journey Strategy 4
  • Customer Profile
  • Customer Journey
  • Messaging by Stage
  • Conversion Pathway
Brand & Messaging 5
  • Brand Strategy
  • Positioning
  • Messaging & Offer Architecture
  • Brand Guidelines
  • Brand Copy Workbook
Website & Digital Strategy 5
  • Website Strategy
  • Website Brief
  • Sitemap
  • Page Strategy
  • SEO Strategy
Sales & Marketing Plan 11

One parent plan, with the sub-plans below.

  • Social Strategy
  • Content Strategy
  • In-Market Activation Plan
  • Paid Media Plan
  • EDM Plan
  • CRM Plan
  • PR Plan
  • Events Plan
  • Partnership / Referral Plan
  • Traditional Media Plan
  • Campaign Calendar
Briefing Documents 9
  • Design Brief
  • Website Brief
  • Photo & Video Brief
  • SEO Brief
  • Paid Media Brief
  • EDM Brief
  • CRM Brief
  • PR Brief
  • Events Brief
Design Output 4
  • Strategy Summary
  • IMC Summary
  • Approved Roadmap
  • Final Brief Pack

Deploy

We launch the approved work, manage the activity, report on performance and improve what is working.

Production & Delivery 9
  • Website Build / Updates
  • Landing Pages
  • Creative Assets
  • Social Assets
  • Video Assets
  • Email Templates
  • Sales Collateral
  • Forms & Automations
  • Tracking Setup
In-Market Activation 9
  • Campaign Launch
  • Social Content Rollout
  • Paid Media Launch
  • EDM Deployment
  • CRM Workflow Deployment
  • PR Outreach
  • Events Activation
  • Partnership Outreach
  • Traditional Media Rollout
Reporting & Optimisation 8
  • Reporting Dashboard
  • Monthly Report
  • Campaign Performance Review
  • Lead Quality Review
  • SEO Performance Review
  • Paid Media Performance Review
  • CRM / EDM Performance Review
  • Recommendations & Next Actions
Deploy Output 5
  • Live Asset Links
  • Reporting Pack
  • Optimisation Backlog
  • Next Sprint Priorities
  • Case Study / Evidence Pack

Deepen

Once the work is live, what we learn feeds back into intelligence, strategy and decisions, so the growth system gets sharper over time.

Intelligence Capture 6
  • Meeting Intelligence
  • Decisions & Follow-Ups
  • Campaign & Content Learnings
  • Performance & Market Signals
  • Client Feedback & Requests
  • Opportunities & Risks
Washback & Governance 5

Learnings are promoted into strategy only after review and approval.

  • Weekly Washback Review
  • Monthly Washback Review
  • Quarterly Washback Review
  • Strategic Change Log
  • Client Approval Gates
Intelligence Layers 4

How the brief separates strategic memory from day-to-day working memory.

  • Approved — reviewed and signed off; the stable strategic layer
  • Active — priorities, meetings and activity, updated as it happens
  • Signal — an observation from reporting or the market, not yet reviewed
  • Proposed Change — a learning in washback, awaiting approval
Deepen Output 4

A living intelligence brief that keeps the approved strategy, current priorities, meetings, performance signals and next decisions in one place.

  • Deepen Loop Intelligence Brief
  • Strategic Intelligence Summary
  • Active Intelligence Update
  • Next Cycle Priorities

THE PACK

Real documents, open to read.

These are working documents from the engine, opened for reading — the format every client receives.

Discover

Featured Discover Summary → Gate 1 Deck → Discover Addendum → Audience Teardown → Competitor Analysis → Offer Worksheet →

Design

Featured Strategy Summary → Featured Brand Book → Brand Strategy → Brand Guidelines → Logo Brief → Copy Deck → Customer Profile → Business Plan → Marketing Plan → Social Strategy → Website Strategy →

Deploy

Featured SEO Strategy → Case Study → Events Plan → Paid Media Plan → Photo & Video Brief → Traditional Media Plan →

A further set of Deploy documents is held back pending clearance.

The method, in market.
